CLAUDE.md:115-145
115| 
116| ### Git in Tests
117| 
118| **Tests that touch git state must use an isolated temp repo — never the real repo CWD.**
119| 
120| Many handlers (lifecycle, strategy, hooks) resolve the git repo from CWD via `OpenRepository`, `GetGitCommonDir`, `DetectFileChanges`, etc. Without isolation, tests can create session state files, shadow branches, or other artifacts in the real `.git/` directory.
121| 
122| Use the `testutil` helpers:
123|
